info.title: Reprocessor API
info.description: API for reading data from MarkLogic via custom code and reprocessing it via custom code.

post.description: Reads data from MarkLogic using custom code and reprocesses it using custom code.

invoke.description: Path to a module to invoke for reading data (in the modules database).

javascript.description: JavaScript code to execute for reading data.

javascriptFile.description: Local file containing JavaScript code to execute for reading data.

xquery.description: XQuery code to execute for reading data.

xqueryFile.description: Local file containing XQuery code to execute for reading data.

partitionsInvoke.description: Path to a module to invoke to define partitions for reading.

partitionsJavascript.description: JavaScript code to define partitions for reading.

partitionsJavascriptFile.description: Local file containing JavaScript code to define partitions for reading.

partitionsXquery.description: XQuery code to define partitions for reading.

partitionsXqueryFile.description: Local file containing XQuery code to define partitions for reading.

vars.description: Variables to send to the code for reading data.

logProgress.description: Log a count of total items read every time this many items are read.

invoke.description: Path to a module to invoke for writing data (in the modules database).

javascript.description: JavaScript code to execute for writing data.

javascriptFile.description: Local file containing JavaScript code to execute for writing data.

xquery.description: XQuery code to execute for writing data.

xqueryFile.description: Local file containing XQuery code to execute for writing data.

externalVariableName.description: Name of the external variable in the custom code for writing.

externalVariableDelimiter.description: Delimiter for multiple values in the external variable.

vars.description: Variables to send to the code for writing data.

abortOnWriteFailure.description: Fail the command when a batch of documents cannot be written.

batchSize.description: Number of values sent to the code for writing data in a single call.

logProgress.description: Log a count of total items processed every time this many items are processed.

threadCount.description: Number of threads for processing items (also defines Spark partitions).

repartition.description: Number of Spark partitions to use.

limit.description: Limit the number of documents processed.

count.description: Only count the number of documents, do not write.

preview.description: Show a preview of the first N documents.
